---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla        
  image: assets/headshot.jpeg
  image-width: 250px
  image-shape: round     
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rsokolsnyder
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/rsokolsn
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rsokolsnyder@gmail.com
---

## Experience

| | | |
|---|---|---|
| **Senior Data Analyst** | Community Tech Alliance | January 2024 – November 2024 |
| **Data Analyst** | Community Tech Alliance | March 2022 - January 2024 |
| **Assistant Data Administrator** | Working America, AFL-CIO | August 2020 - March 2022 |
| **Data Assistant** | Working America, AFL-CIO | August 2019 - August 2020 |

## Education

| | | |
|---|---|---|
| **Master of Data Science** | University of British Columbia | 2025–present |
| **BA, Mathematics & International Affairs** | Lewis & Clark College | 2019 |

## Skills

**Machine Learning** scikit-learn, PyTorch, XGBoost, spaCy | supervised & unsupervised learning, model evaluation, natural language processing, time-series forecasting, geospatial modelling  
**Programming & Data** Python (Pandas, NumPy), R, SQL, dbt, MongoDB | OOP, database management   
**Visualization** ggplot, Altair, Matplotlib, Looker Studio, Shiny  
**Cloud & Infrastructure** Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, Workflows, Looker), AWS, Docker, Github  
**Statistical Analysis** regression, hypothesis testing, A/B testing, Bayesian & frequentist modelling
